summary: DHH announces the beta release of 'Agile Web Development with Rails' by Dave Thomas, published through the Pragmatic Programmers. The demand was so high within the first hour that downloads were slowing down. He expresses pride in the milestone and thanks Dave Thomas and contributors. The post is a brief dispatch sent from Brazil.
key_points: The first major Rails book was released in beta form, signaling Rails' growing legitimacy as a framework
Overwhelming first-hour demand indicated strong community interest in Rails
The book was a collaborative effort between Dave Thomas and community contributors
money_quotes: The demand within the first hour has already been huge.
I'm really proud to see this happen.
key_insight: The beta release of the first major Rails book marked a pivotal moment in the framework's transition from niche tool to mainstream web development platform.
